scope.provider: Binance official public USD-M futures interfaces
scope.market_calendar: continuous except observed provider maintenance or disconnect
scope.utc_day_semantics: partition and resampling boundary only, never a crypto market close
scope.listed_product_rule: ETF equity and listed-futures context must use the actual venue calendar and cannot create a Binance close

wire_evidence.websocket_payload: exact UTF-8 combined-stream wrapper text as received
wire_evidence.rest_payload: exact UTF-8 public response body plus method endpoint parameters response status and receipt clocks
wire_evidence.compression: zstd level 3 with frame checksum and content size
wire_evidence.frame_hash_chain: SHA-256 over canonical frame identity including previous frame hash and both payload hashes

writer.transaction_scope: one raw frame event index and all typed rows commit atomically
writer.queue_overflow: invalidate all affected active segments and stop the capture without dropping evidence silently
writer.cap_action: finish the current atomic frame then stop before accepting another frame

raw_to_typed_link.append_semantic_validation: strict duplicate-key-free JSON must agree with the typed event before either is committed
raw_to_typed_link.connection_sequence_rule: increase by exactly one without gaps
raw_to_typed_link.wall_clock_regression_rule: retain raw evidence and invalidate clock quality rather than silently rewrite receipt time

rest_typing.request_clocks: wall and monotonic nanoseconds immediately before request dispatch, paired with frame receipt clocks after the full response body
rest_typing.rate_limit_header: non-negative X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-1M when supplied; absence remains unknown
rest_typing.exchange_information: exact raw response retained; symbol tick metadata is parsed before segment creation
rest_typing.depth_snapshot: exact lastUpdateId plus raw bid and ask ladders
rest_typing.open_interest: finite non-negative openInterest value and exact response time

depth_state.state_sample: every accepted diff-depth event after atomic local-book application
depth_state.target_state_lookup: first same-segment state at or after the requested delayed timestamp
depth_state.displayed_removal_rank: same-side rank immediately before the update
depth_state.displayed_addition_rank: same-side rank immediately after the update

trade_matching.price_match: exact exchange tick after decimal normalization
trade_matching.quantity_allocation: chronological bounded allocation without exceeding either observed aggregate execution or displayed removal
trade_matching.ambiguous_or_unmatched_quantity: retained separately and never labeled cancellation

clock_contract.offset_estimator: server time minus host wall-clock request midpoint from the minimum-RTT probe retained in the segment
clock_contract.rtt_nanoseconds: response wall-clock nanoseconds minus request wall-clock nanoseconds
clock_contract.corrected_feed_latency: host receive wall time plus retained offset minus exchange event time
clock_contract.negative_corrected_latency: retained as a clock-quality failure observation and never clamped

non_claims: Capture qualification is not predictive evidence.
A synchronized visible-book path is not an exchange fill.
UTC midnight is not a Binance market close.
No AI leverage trading profitability ROI or production claim is authorized.
